amendatorysection.chaptername: State University, State Colleges, and Postsecondary Education
amendatorysection.para: (a) Compile the data submitted pursuant to sections 85-1432 and 85-1433;
(b) Make such data publicly available on its website in an aggregated, searchable, and downloadable format; and
(c) On or before December 31 of each year, publish an annual report.
(2) Data reported publicly under this section shall not include the names of individual employees or other personally identifiable information.
